avatarAlt: 8bit picture of John and wife Erika
name: john nutter
bio:
I write things here. Memories, takes, fragments, and sometimes essays. No particular subject. I'm interested in cities at night, the way memory distorts things, music that sounds like weather, and objects that outlast their context.

Based in Decatur, GA. Developer by trade. Collector of things that don't fit anywhere specific.

This site has been running since 2014 and with various intentions. The current version is the most honest version — which is to say, it doesn't pretend to be anything other than a place I write.
